overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The wet streets reflect vibrant neon signs and towering skyscrapers while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the sidewalks. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing high-fidelity graphics with a cinematic atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk in a futuristic downtown area. The large red 'softsys' neon sign dominates the view ahead, while digital billboards line the left side. Pedestrians walk in various directions and futuristic cars are parked along the right curb.

segments.scene_description: The path curves left, bringing the Marmi building with its prominent digital displays into view on the right. Palm trees line the street and pedestrians with colorful umbrellas pass by. The 'Jacked and Coke' neon sign becomes visible ahead on the left.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a wide intersection, the camera steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk. A black futuristic car waits at the crossing as pedestrians with umbrellas move in the same direction. Tall skyscrapers with glowing windows rise in the background, creating a dense urban canyon effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk downtown that transitions from a neon-lit corridor into a towering urban canyon. It begins by moving along a wet concrete sidewalk dominated by a large red softsys neon sign and digital billboards, passing parked futuristic cars and scattered pedestrians. As the path curves left, the view shifts to reveal the Marmi building's digital displays and palm trees on the right, while a Jacked and Coke sign emerges ahead on the left amidst a crowd of colorful umbrellas. The scene then opens up as the camera steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk at a wide intersection, pausing briefly beside a waiting black futuristic car. Finally, the perspective tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers with glowing windows that enclose the street in a dense, luminous architectural valley.
